columns.name: email
columns.notes: Stored lowercase in DB. Used as unique identifier for deduplication.

columns.name: password
columns.notes: BCrypt-hashed before storage (work factor 12). API validator requires min 8 chars; importer has NO min-length check.

columns.name: phone
columns.notes: Format regex comes from API FluentValidation (CreateUserRequestValidator), not enforced during CSV import.

columns.name: role
columns.notes: Enum.Parse with ignoreCase:true, so 'admin', 'ADMIN', 'Admin' all valid. Stored as varchar(20).

columns.name: documentNumber
columns.notes: DB has partial unique index (unique when NOT NULL).
